about.label: About
about.title: Developer with a
about.p1: Student in Bachelor's 3 — Management IT & Software Engineering, I stand out with a rare dual skill set: I build robust applications while deeply understanding the business challenges behind them.
about.p2: This hybrid profile allows me to communicate effectively with business teams, translate functional requirements into technical solutions, and deliver software that truly solves end-user problems.
about.p3: I am looking for an end-of-study internship to apply my skills in a stimulating professional environment, contribute to real projects, and continue to grow alongside expert teams.
